---
title: "Ethel Romanes"
---

## Ethel Romanes

**Dates:** (1856–1927)

### Description

biographer of CMY

### Biography

She married (1879) George John Romanes (1848–1894); they had six children, of whom two died in WW1;  the one girl became a nun and died young;  Ethel Romanes became a Roman Catholic in 1919 . [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from April 29. [1896?]
- Letter from [May 1894]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
